query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "vision as unified multimodal generation" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) by empirically investigating the core mechanism of "Unified Multimodal Generation" (specifically the conflict between understanding and generation capabilities in models sharing a backbone), which is the central subject of the user's research question. It provides essential diagnostic evidence on the limitations and gradient interference mechanisms within the exact architectural paradigm the user intends to extend.
